zh.lifeSummary: Richard Musard是Hasculfus Musaed的兒子，於大約1125年出生在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞。他和Isabel de Neville至少有2個兒子。他去世於1187年之前在英國英格蘭德比夏爾斯特費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Musard是Hasculfus Musaed的儿子，于大约1125年出生在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞。他和Isabel de Neville至少有2个儿子。他去世于1187年之前在英国英格兰德比夏爾斯特費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Musard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Durham): nickname or occupational name from Middle English mustard ‘mustard’ (Old French mostarde). The allusion could perhaps be to someone with a sharp tongue, but is probably usually to a dealer in mustard.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Musard was born about 1125, in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom as the son of Hasculfus Musaed. He had at least 2 sons with Isabel de Neville. He died before 1187, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Musard est né environ 1125, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Hasculfus Musaed. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Isabel de Neville. Il est décédé avant 1187, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Musard wurde um 1125 in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Hasculfus Musaed geboren. Er hatte mit Isabel de Neville mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb vor 1187 in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Musard è nato il circa 1125 nel Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Hasculfus Musaed. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Isabel de Neville. Morì prima del 1187, nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Musardは約1125年にイギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーでHasculfus Musaedの息子として生まれた。彼はIsabel de Nevilleとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1187年以前にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Musard(은)는 대략 1125년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에서 Hasculfus Musaed의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Isabel de Neville(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1187년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 체스터필드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Musard nasceu aproximadamente 1125, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Hasculfus Musaed. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Isabel de Neville. Ele faleceu antes 1187, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Musard родился около 1125 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Hasculfus Musaed. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Isabel de Neville. Он умер перед 1187 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.
